repos.name: chopratejas/headroom
repos.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
repos.descriptionZh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。
